steps.name: There is TeamOwner with team LeaveChannel on Staging backend
User TeamOwner configures MLS for team LeaveChannel
TeamOwner enables channel feature for team LeaveChannel via backdoor
User TeamOwner adds users Member1,Member2 to team LeaveChannel with role Member
Register sender device and send connection request to receiver via backend
TeamOwner has channel conversation LeavingChannel in team LeaveChannel
User Member1 and Member2 are available for channel participant selection
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
And I see conversation LeavingChannel in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name LeavingChannel in conversation list
Then I see channel conversation LeavingChannel is in foreground
